content.text:
### Radiofrequency Microneedling in Katy, TX

Radiofrequency (RF) microneedling is a popular cosmetic treatment that combines microneedling with radiofrequency energy to stimulate collagen production, tighten skin, and address issues like wrinkles, acne scars, sagging skin, enlarged pores, and uneven tone[[1]](https://agelessmedspakaty.com/rf-microneedling)[[2]](https://htownaesthetics.com/secret-rf-microneedling-in-texas). It's minimally invasive, suitable for all skin types, and often involves little downtime, making it a go-to for skin rejuvenation[[3]](https://glowupmdspa.com/services/rf-microneedling)[[4]](https://sugarlandmedspa.com/rf-microneedling-katy). Treatments typically last 30-60 minutes, with results improving over several weeks as collagen rebuilds. Costs can range from $300-$800 per session, depending on the provider and area treated, and multiple sessions are usually recommended for optimal results.

If you're looking for providers in Katy, TX, here are some highly rated options based on recent search results. I recommend contacting them directly for consultations, pricing, and availability, as details can change.

#### Top Providers in Katy, TX:
- **Ageless MedSpa**: Offers RF microneedling for skin tightening and rejuvenation. Located in Katy, they emphasize non-invasive solutions[[1]](https://agelessmedspakaty.com/rf-microneedling).  
  - Address: (Specific address not listed in results; check their site)  
  - Website: agelessmedspakaty.com  
  - Phone: Not specified; visit site for details.

- **H-Town Aesthetics**: Specializes in Secret RF microneedling to treat sagging skin, sun damage, and more. Safe for all skin types with customizable options[[2]](https://htownaesthetics.com/secret-rf-microneedling-in-texas).  
  - Address: Katy, TX (exact location on site)  
  - Website: htownaesthetics.com  
  - Phone: Not specified.

- **Glow Up MD Spa**: Provides RF microneedling to reduce wrinkles, scars, and fine lines for firmer, smoother skin[[3]](https://glowupmdspa.com/services/rf-microneedling).  
  - Address: Katy, TX  
  - Website: glowupmdspa.com  
  - Phone: Not specified.

- **Kristin Schmidt MD (Vivace Experience)**: Uses advanced RF microneedling for customized results, focusing on skin concerns like aging and texture[[5]](https://kschmidtobgyn.com/microneedling).  
  - Address: 27200 Katy Freeway, Suite 530, Katy, TX  
  - Website: kschmidtobgyn.com  
  - Phone: Not specified.

- **Sugar Land Medical Spa (near Katy)**: Offers RF microneedling with Exion® for tightening, wrinkle reduction, and scar improvement with minimal downtime[[4]](https://sugarlandmedspa.com/rf-microneedling-katy).  
  - Address: Near Katy (Sugar Land location)  
  - Website: sugarlandmedspa.com  
  - Phone: Not specified.

- **Luminous MediSpa**: Provides RF microneedling alongside other treatments like lasers and peels. Highly rated in Katy and Fulshear[[6]](https://luminousmedispa.com/).  
  - Address: 410 W Grand Pkwy S, Suite 310, Katy, TX 77494  
  - Phone: (281) 665-3666.

- **About Face & Body**: Features PiXel8-RF microneedling to smooth, tighten, and improve skin texture with minimal invasion[[7]](https://aboutfaceandbodykaty.com/services/skin-treatments/pixel8-rf-microneedling-katy-tx).  
  - Address: Katy, TX  
  - Website: aboutfaceandbodykaty.com  
  - Phone: Not specified.

- **Hibiscus Aesthetics & Wellness**: A med spa offering RF treatments, serving Katy in-person and virtually[[8]](https://www.hibiscus.health/).  
  - Address: Katy, TX  
  - Website: hibiscus.health  
  - Phone: Not specified.

- **Aesthetic Master Infusions LLC**: Combines RF with microcurrent therapy for skin rejuvenation and anti-aging[[9]](https://www.aestheticmasterinfusions.com/rf-and-microcurrent-therapy).  
  - Address: Katy, TX  
  - Website: aestheticmasterinfusions.com  
  - Phone: Not specified.

- **Luxe Medical Aesthetics**: Includes microneedling (with RF options) and is the highest-rated med spa in Katy[[10]](https://theluxeeffect.com/).  
  - Address: 21770 Kingsland Blvd, Katy, TX 77450  
  - Website: theluxeeffect.com  
  - Phone: Not specified.

Before booking, consult a licensed professional to ensure it's suitable for your skin type and health. If you have more details (e.g., specific concerns or budget), I can refine this search!
